title: epipactis helleborine f. alba
intro: Epipactis helleborine f. alba is a rare, white-flowering variant of the Epipactis helleborine orchid, a perennial plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Epipactis helleborine f. alba typically involve drying and powdering the roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
